pericopes.pericopeTitle: A COMMUNAL PRAYER FOR GOD’S BLESSINGS

entries.author: St. Augustine of Hippo
entries.title: CHRIST IS THE ONLY WAY TO SALVATION.
entries.body: This, I say, is the universal way for the deliverance of believers, concerning which the faithful Abraham received the divine assurance, In thy seed shall all nations be blessed.{fn:0} He, indeed, was by birth a Chaldaean; but, that he might receive these great promises, and that there might be propagated from him a seed disposed by angels in the hand of a Mediator,{fn:1} in whom this universal way, thrown open to all nations for the deliverance of the soul, might be found, he was ordered to leave his country, and kindred, and father’s house. Then was he himself, first of all, delivered from the Chaldaean superstitions, and by his obedience worshipped the one true God, whose promises he faithfully trusted. This is the universal way, of which it is said in holy prophecy, God be merciful unto us, and bless us, and cause his face to shine upon us; that thy way may be known upon earth, thy saving health among all nations. And hence, when our Savior, so long after, had taken flesh of the seed of Abraham, he says of himself, I am the way, the truth, and the life.{fn:2} {fn:3}
